dialogue_text: What is the matter with Dejah Thoris?
source_excerpt: "What is the matter with Dejah Thoris?" I blurted out at her. "Why will she not speak to me?"

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: Why will she not speak to me?
source_excerpt: "What is the matter with Dejah Thoris?" I blurted out at her. "Why will she not speak to me?"

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: She says you have angered her, and that is all she will say, except that she is the daughter of a jed and the granddaughter of a jeddak and she has been humiliated by a creature who could not polish the teeth of her grandmother's sorak.
source_excerpt: "She says you have angered her, and that is all she will say, except that she is the daughter of a jed and the granddaughter of a jeddak and she has been humiliated by a creature who could not polish the teeth of her grandmother's sorak."

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: What might a sorak be, Sola?
source_excerpt: I pondered over this report for some time, finally asking, "What might a sorak be, Sola?"

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_text: A little animal about as big as my hand, which the red Martian women keep to play with,
source_excerpt: "A little animal about as big as my hand, which the red Martian women keep to play with," explained Sola.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.

review_notes: Speaker could not be resolved from the source context.

dialogue_text: not fit to polish her shoes.
source_excerpt: Not fit to polish the teeth of her grandmother's cat! I must rank pretty low in the consideration of Dejah Thoris, I thought; but I could not help laughing at the strange figure of speech, so homely and in this respect so earthly. It mad...

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
